leadText: The Berry Pots (Japanese: きのみプランター Berry Planter) are Key Items introduced in Generation IV.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Berry Pots are four portable planters that allow the player to plant, water, and grow Berry trees while traveling.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method HG SS Route 36 (from Floria for catching or defeating Sudowoodo )

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA Handy containers for cultivating Berries wherever you go. S V Portable containers that allow you to easily cultivate Berries anywhere and anytime.
